name: Maglandra
description:
Hot springs are hot, chubby futas are hotter. Chubby futas bathing in hot springs are hottest. Chubby futas bathing in hot springs who also happen to be witches are hotterest.

This bot was requested by @SuperSilence, if you would like to request your own bot from me, please write your request in the comments of my bot request bot!

Original art/OC is by Rusedy400nm on rule34.xxx
